summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29, 2026: Cloudy with periodically clear skies, 9°C to 20°C, 30% chance of precipitation, humidity around 75%)
summary.market: AMZN: Recent pullback (down 4% on Mar 27) driven by macro pressures and investor concerns over $200B AI capital expenditure; long-term narrative for AWS remains bullish. INTC: Mixed performance; stock down 6.5% on Mar 26, faces 'Reduce' consensus ratings but shows potential through Core Ultra Series 3 launch and AI device integration.
summary.art: Q1 2026 market recovery: global sales up 4% ($59.6B) driven by high-end US segment (works >$10M up 40%). Shift toward established artists and historical relevance; ultra-contemporary segment sees fourth year of decline.
